summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Metro Travel Hotel Booking Platform. All 11 features tested successfully - Homepage search, Search Results, Hotel Detail, Extranet Dashboard/Property/Rooms/Pricing, Admin Dashboard/Hotels/Users/Bookings, and User Dashboard. Seed data verified with 2 approved hotels (Grand Sultan Hotel Istanbul 5-star, Bodrum Bay Resort 4-star), rooms with rate plans, and test booking.

issues: Destination selector click requires force=True due to overlay - works but may indicate z-index issue

passed_tests: Homepage loads with Metro Travel branding and hero section
Search console with destination, dates, and guests selectors
Popular destinations section (Istanbul, Antalya, Bodrum, Cappadocia)
Search with Istanbul destination - returns 2 properties
Search with Bodrum destination - returns 1 property (Bodrum Bay Resort)
Hotel cards display with correct pricing from seed data
Hotel Detail Page - Grand Sultan Hotel with gallery, amenities, rooms
Room cards with rate plans (Room Only, Breakfast Included)
Booking widget with date selection and price display
Hotel Owner Login (ahmet@grandsultanhotel.com)
Extranet Dashboard - shows 1 property, 1 booking, ₺5,800 revenue
Extranet Property Page - edit hotel details form
Extranet Rooms Page - 3 rooms (Deluxe Double, Sultan Suite, Standard Twin)
Extranet Pricing Page - rate plans and calendar view
Admin Login (admin@metrotravel.com)
Admin Dashboard - 5 hotels, 2 pending, 24 users, ₺11,430 revenue
Admin Hotels Page - list with approve/reject actions
Admin Users Page - 24 users with role badges
Admin Bookings Page - 4 confirmed bookings
Customer Login (elif@gmail.com)
User Dashboard - profile and booking tabs
Past booking visible - Grand Sultan Hotel (₺5,800)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features working correctly. Seed data includes 2 approved hotels with rooms and rate plans. Test booking exists for customer elif@gmail.com. Payment system is MOCKED (iyzico in mock mode). Use April 2025/2026 dates for search testing as inventory is set for that period.

mocked_apis.payment: iyzico payment system is in mock mode - bookings auto-confirm with PAID status
